channel.title: Bbc-Sport on Moh le CATALAN MALIEN
channel.description: Recent content in Bbc-Sport on Moh le CATALAN MALIEN

item.title: Selfish Salah should be dropped from Anfield finale - Rooney
item.description:
Source : BBC Sport

Mohamed Salah should be dropped from Liverpool’s season finale for “selfish” criticism of the club, says Wayne Rooney.

Cet article a été généré automatiquement depuis le flux RSS de BBC Sport.

item.title: West Ham relegation may cost London taxpayers £2.5m
item.description:
Source : BBC Sport

London taxpayers may have to pay an extra £2.5m if West Ham are relegated from the Premier League, because of the club’s lease agreement for London Stadium.

Cet article a été généré automatiquement depuis le flux RSS de BBC Sport.
